import unreal
abp='/Game/Character/ABP_Bodycam'
BP=unreal.BlueprintService
gid = BP.add_get_variable_node(abp,'Walk','WalkPlayRate',-260,180)
print('get node:', gid)
ok = BP.connect_nodes(abp,'Walk',gid,'WalkPlayRate','FD4B8E16402A37FCFBF0E1A744A5CE19','PlayRate')
print('wire:', ok)
res = BP.compile_blueprint(abp)
print('compile:', res)
v = unreal.AnimGraphService.validate_state_machine(abp,'Locomotion')
print('valid:', v.is_valid, [str(e) for e in v.errors], [str(w) for w in v.warnings])
print('save:', unreal.EditorAssetLibrary.save_asset(abp, only_if_is_dirty=False))
